name: partnership-marketing
description: Plan and execute partnership-driven growth — influencer marketing, affiliate programs, creator partnerships, referral programs, and public relations. Covers outreach, commission models, contract frameworks, and FTC compliance. Use when the CEO mentions 'influencer,' 'affiliate,' 'referral program,' 'creator partnership,' 'brand ambassador,' 'PR,' 'press release,' 'media relations,' or 'earned media.
